name: Feature Request

## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
e.g. "I find it frustrating when Koda ..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be used.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references to similar implementations.
